CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Robert Newcombe and Thomas Summersall.
Court finds good cause to waive appearance by witness in open court.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) The Muir Group, Inc. and Chadwick Houser.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $120,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $29,427.60
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1218.37
Total Judgment in the amount of $150,645.97

Judgment signed in open court.
